common.auth_required:
Authentication required

Use /start to register first.
common.too_many_requests: Too many requests. Please wait a moment.
common.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

start.welcome_new:
Welcome to Mentor Bot!

Your personal onboarding assistant for a smooth transition into your new role.

What I can help you with:
- Complete your onboarding checklist
- Search the knowledge base for answers
- Schedule meetings with your mentor
- Access important documents
- Track your progress
- Get help from HR

To get started, you need to register using your invitation link.
Please send me your invitation token or use the link from your email.
start.welcome_returning:
Welcome back, *{name}*!

Use the menu to continue your onboarding.
start.menu_header:
Main Menu

Choose an option below:
start.register_prompt: You need to register first. Use /start to begin registration.
start.register_error:
{result}

Please check the token or contact HR.

help.feat_tasks: My Tasks - View and manage onboarding checklist
help.feat_kb: Knowledge Base - Search for information and FAQ
help.feat_meetings: Meetings - Schedule and manage meetings with mentor/HR
help.feat_mentor: My Mentor - Contact your assigned mentor
help.feat_hr: Contact HR - Get help from HR department
help.feat_feedback: Feedback - Share your thoughts and rate your experience
help.feat_escalate: Escalate - Escalate issues to HR or mentor

Try a different query or contact HR.

documents.title: Documents & Resources
documents.description: Access documents relevant to your role and department:
documents.dept_empty: No documents found for your department.
documents.tap_to_view: Tap a document to view details and download files:

meetings.title: Meetings
meetings.use_options: Use the options below to manage your meetings.
meetings.schedule_instructions:
Please provide the meeting details:

1. Meeting title
2. Description (optional)
3. Date and time (e.g., 2025-12-31 14:00)
4. Duration in minutes (default: 60)

Please enter the meeting title:
meetings.title_too_short: Title must be at least {min} characters long.
meetings.enter_description: Great! Now please provide a brief description of the meeting (or type 'skip'):
meetings.enter_datetime: Now please provide the date and time in format YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM (e.g., 2025-12-31 14:00):
meetings.invalid_datetime: Invalid format. Please use YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM (e.g., 2025-12-31 14:00):
meetings.past_datetime: The meeting time must be in the future. Please enter a future date and time:
meetings.enter_duration: Finally, please provide the duration in minutes (or type '60' for default):
meetings.invalid_duration: Duration must be between {min} and {max} minutes.
meetings.schedule_failed: Failed to schedule meeting. Please try again.

escalation.use_options: Use the options below to escalate an issue or view your existing escalations.

escalation.enter_title: Thank you! Now please provide a brief title for your escalation:

escalation.create_failed: Failed to create escalation. Please try again.

feedback.title: Feedback & Surveys
feedback.description: Help us improve your onboarding experience!
feedback.opt_pulse: Daily Pulse Survey - Quick well-being check
feedback.anonymous: Your feedback is anonymous and helps us serve you better.
feedback.anonymity_prompt: How would you like to submit your feedback?
feedback.pulse_prompt:
How are you feeling today?
Please rate your well-being on a scale of 1-10:

1 = Very bad
5 = Average
10 = Excellent

feedback.pulse_thanks:

Your rating: {rating}/10

Your input helps us improve your onboarding experience.
feedback.pulse_thanks_anon:
Thank you for your anonymous feedback!

Your rating: {rating}/10

Your input helps us improve your onboarding experience.

calendar.title: Google Calendar Integration
calendar.benefits:
Connect your Google Calendar to automatically sync meetings and receive reminders directly in your calendar.

Benefits:
- Automatic event creation
- Calendar reminders
- Sync across devices
calendar.connect_instructions: Click the button below to authorize access to your Google Calendar:
calendar.disconnected:
Google Calendar has been disconnected.

You can reconnect at any time from the calendar menu.
calendar.disconnect_failed: Failed to disconnect calendar. Please try again.
